## Load libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(indicspecies)
library(microbiome)
```

## Load data

```{r}
metadata = read.delim('./Datasets/radiation_lab_metadata_improved.txt', row.names = 1)
taxonomy = read.delim('./Datasets/taxonomy.tsv', row.names = 1)
counts = read.delim('./Datasets/feature-table.txt', skip=1, row.names=1, check.names = FALSE)  
tree = read_tree('./Datasets/tree.nwk')

# Merge time categorical and dose categorical
metadata = metadata %>%
  mutate(time_dose = paste(Time_of_Collection_categorical, dose_categorical, sep = "_"))
```

## Phyloseq object

```{r}
taxonomy_formatted = taxonomy %>% 
  separate(col = Taxon, 
           into = c('Domain','Phylum','Class','Order',
                    'Family','Genus','Species'),
           sep=';', fill='right') %>% 
  select(-Confidence) %>% 
  as.matrix()

counts_formatted = counts %>% 
  as.matrix()

ps = phyloseq(sample_data(metadata),
              otu_table(counts_formatted, taxa_are_rows = T),
              tax_table(taxonomy_formatted),
              tree)

saveRDS(ps,'./Datasets/phyloseq_taxonomy.rds')
```

## Load data

```{r}
ps = readRDS('./Datasets/phyloseq_taxonomy.rds')
```

## Indicator species analysis

```{r}
# Aggregate ASVs, convert phyloseq to relative abundance, and apply abundance filter

ps_genus = tax_glom(ps,'Genus')
ps_relab = transform(ps_genus, 'compositional')
ps_filt = filter_taxa(ps_relab, function(x) mean(x) > 0.001, TRUE)
otu_table = data.frame(otu_table(ps_filt))

set.seed(123)
indval = multipatt( t(otu_table), 
            cluster= ps_filt@sam_data$time_dose,
 		  control = how(nperm = 999) )

summary(indval, indvalcomp = TRUE)

# Extract into table
indval_table = as.data.frame(indval$sign)
```

```{r}
library(ggpubr)

# Process the indicator species results
# First, let's extract the significant results (p-value < 0.05)
indval_significant = indval_table %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05 & stat > 0.7) %>%
  select(s.10_days_0_dose:p.value) %>%
  rownames_to_column("ASV")

# Reshape the data for plotting
indval_long = indval_significant %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("s."), 
               names_to = "time_dose", 
               values_to = "indicator") %>%
  mutate(time_dose = str_remove(time_dose, "^s\\.")) %>%
  filter(indicator == 1)  # Keep only the groups they're indicators for

# Get taxonomy information for the significant ASVs
tax_significant = tax_table(ps_filt) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("ASV") %>%
  filter(ASV %in% indval_long$ASV) %>%
  mutate(tax_label = paste(Genus, " (", ASV, ")"))

# Join with indicator data
indval_plot_data = indval_long %>%
  left_join(tax_significant %>% select(ASV, tax_label, Class)) %>%
  left_join(indval_significant %>% select(ASV, stat, p.value))

# Create the dot plot
ind_plot = ggplot(indval_plot_data, aes(x = time_dose, 
                                        y = tax_label, 
                                        size = stat,
                                        color = Class)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 8), 
                        name = "Indicator Statistic") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.position = "right",
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray90", linetype = "dashed"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = "Radiation Time and Dose ",
       y = "Indicator ASV (Genus - ASV ID)",
       title = "Indicator Species Across Time and Dose Combinations",
       color = "Phylum") +
  guides(size = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 1)))

ind_plot

ggsave("./Results/indicator_species_dotplot.png", width = 12, height = 8)
```
